Meaning.En: Valuables, such as gold, silver, jewels, or money, that are hidden or buried and often of great historical or monetary value.
Meaning.Example: The pirates buried their treasure on a remote island.

Situation.Vi: Người ta đào bới hoặc tìm kiếm kho báu bị chôn giấu.
Situation.En: People dig or search for hidden or buried valuables.

Situation.Vi: Một bảo vật quý giá trong bảo tàng hoặc gia đình.
Situation.En: A precious item kept in a museum or family collection.

Meaning.En: To hold something or someone in high regard; to value deeply.
Meaning.Example: She treasures every moment spent with her grandmother.

Situation.Vi: Cảm xúc khi giữ gìn kỷ vật hoặc người thân yêu.
Situation.En: Emotionally valuing a person or object deeply, often due to sentimental significance.

Situation.Vi: Trong văn chương hoặc thơ ca, dùng để diễn tả sự trân quý.
Situation.En: In literature or poetry, used to express deep appreciation or affection.
